name: mumu-openclaw-skills
description: MuMuAINovel Autonomous Showrunner Skills. Allows agents to manage, write, and audit novels.
author: Nicholas Kevin <crypto2042@outlook.com>

tools.name: bind_project
tools.description: Create a new novel or link your state to an existing project ID.

tools.name: generate_outline
tools.description: Generate novel outlines automatically based on plot.

tools.name: trigger_batch
tools.description: Trigger remote batch generation of chapters to the backend.

tools.name: fetch_unaudited
tools.description: Pull down draft chapters from the inbox that need your review.

tools.name: analyze_chapter
tools.description: Verify chapters via System RAG, checking memory consistency.

tools.name: review_chapter
tools.description: Audit chapter drafts. Overwrite if failed, approve if perfect.

tools.name: check_foreshadows
tools.description: Review unresolved foreshadows and incorporate them via this tool.

tools.name: manage_memory
tools.description: Manually add foreshadowing nodes or manage lore.
